summary: Highly praised 1995 performance with a scorching first set; recording source and quality are not specified.
review: The sole reviewer rates this concert as one of the best shows of 1995, highlighting an especially scorching first set. No details about the recording method or audio fidelity were provided, so the technical quality remains unknown. Overall sentiment is strongly positive despite the lack of recording information.

ai_rating.rationale: The show is lauded as a top‑tier 1995 performance, but with only one brief review and no recording details, the rating leans on musical praise while accounting for unknown audio quality.
